name: Mole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, combine chicken and water. Add extra water if 4 cups of water do not cover the chicken.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat for 20 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
3. In a small bowl, mix mole, tomato sauce, Mexican chocolate, and chicken bouillon cube.
4. Remove one cup of broth from the Dutch oven and add it to the mole mixture.
5. Mash ingredients together with a potato masher until creamy and smooth, without lumps.
6. Add salt to taste.
7. Pour the mole sauce into the Dutch oven and mix with the boiled chicken.
8. Cook for another 20 minutes, then turn off heat and cover.
Makes 4 to 5 servings.
I hope you can find a jar of mole, but if you can't let me know. Cause my brother has addresses to companies that sell Mexican spices, sauces, and products. I'll get back to you with the empanadas recipe when I corner my mom. Later.
Susy
